subject: Re: FW: 384413-6: Review and advice on construction contract with Promax Brisbane Pty Ltd:
snippet: Hi Nicole, I have almost completed the restructure of the company, and will have the remaining part of the invoice paid soon. Thank you for your patience. On Wed, Aug 6, 2025 at 4:13 PM Nicole Stone
